Then there's a gap until Samantha saw her at the library from 12pm to 1pm. Before that, between 8am and 12pm, there's no mention of her activities. Then Betty saw her buying a bike from 1pm to 2pm. So after the library, she went to the bike shop. Then Sarah saw her buying a phone from 2pm to 9pm. That's a long time at the electronics store. After that, Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. And the pool closed after 10pm. So, the key here is to find any time windows where Jennifer wasn't accounted for. Because from 5-8 she was at work, then nothing until 12, then she was at the library until 1pm, etc. So the only unaccounted time is between 8am and 12pm. Therefore, she could have gone to the pool during that window.
